input_text:
Choosing between Kubernetes and Docker Swarm for container orchestration.

Docker Swarm: simpler to set up and operate. But ecosystem has stagnated — Helm charts, GitOps tooling, and most DevOps tooling targets Kubernetes. Finding Swarm expertise is hard.

Kubernetes: steeper learning curve, more complex. But it's the industry standard, our DevOps contractor already knows it, and we get access to the Helm, ArgoCD, and Keda ecosystems for free. Long-term, it's easier to hire for.

Going with Kubernetes.

expected.text: Use Kubernetes (over Docker Swarm) for container orchestration — industry standard, ecosystem (Helm/ArgoCD/Keda), DevOps contractor expertise, easier long-term hiring
